channel.title: Token Selection on Yellowtown's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Token Selection on Yellowtown's Blog

item.title: Video-KTR: Token Attribution-Driven Video Reasoning Enhancement
item.description: Video-KTR proposes a modality-aware token-level reinforcement learning framework that identifies three types of key tokens—visual, temporal, and entropy—through counterfactual perturbation, performing policy updates only on key tokens. Surpassing GPT-4o with 42.7% on Video-Holmes benchmark, it provides new insights for fine-grained RL in video reasoning.
